body:
📢 *IMPORTANT NOTICE: STAR BATCH LAUNCH* 📢

Dear Students,

Our Principal Sir has announced an exciting new initiative today! Following the *Half-Yearly Exams* in *September 2026*, the school is launching a specialized `Star Batch.`

Here are the key details you need to know:

• *Eligibility:* Students scoring `above 85%` in the September exams.

• *Core Focus:* Advanced conceptual training in *Mathematics* and *Science*.

• *Faculty:* Top-tier internal teachers alongside expert _external faculties_ from coaching centers.

• *Objective:* To provide elite guidance and maximize your academic potential.

> "Aim high, prepare hard, and secure your seat in the ultimate batch of achievers!"
